---
title: Homepage
---

![This is me](~/images/IMG_0148.jpg)



Hero Section:
A clear, impactful headline that summarizes your value proposition.
Example: "Expert Negotiation & Conflict Resolution Training for Leaders and Teams"
A subheading could briefly explain your approach.
Example: "Offering evidence-based techniques from research, tailored to your organization's needs."
Include a Call to Action (CTA) like "Learn More" or "Contact Me".

About You (Quick Introduction):
A short paragraph about your background, your PhD in negotiations, and your professional experience. Mention that your training incorporates scientific research to offer proven methods.
CTA: "Read More About My Background" linking to the About page.

Services Overview:
A brief section highlighting your main offerings (executive training, conflict resolution workshops, agile coaching, change management). Use icons or small images next to each service for visual appeal.
CTA: "Explore My Services"

Testimonials (If Available):
A small section with a few testimonials from clients or students to build trust. If you don’t have any yet, this can be a placeholder.

Contact or Booking CTA:
Invite visitors to get in touch or book a session. A button that leads to the Contact page or a scheduling tool is ideal.
CTA: "Book a Consultation"
